title: ODS-E Equipment Register
description: Equipment hierarchy and technical attributes for a single piece of site equipment, sourced from ERP/EAM systems

site_id.description: Identifier of the site where this equipment is installed

equipment_type.description: Standardized equipment type within the site hierarchy

equipment_subtype.description: Vendor-specific equipment subtype for additional detail

parent_equipment_id.description: Canonical equipment ID of the parent in the hierarchy (for cascade risk traversal)

source_equipment_id.description: Native equipment identifier in the originating ERP or SCADA system

install_date.description: Date the equipment was installed (ISO 8601 date)

design_capacity_kw.description: Design or nameplate capacity in kilowatts

cost_center.description: Cost center or financial reporting unit associated with this equipment
